creator: starkhome+gene@sbstark.cs.sunysb.edu
text:
I used my Archive tape drive again after a long time.
	There seems to be a race on closing the device that causes the
	system to do a hard reset (no panic) and end up in a state
	where the IDE controller won't access the disk, necessitating
	the use of the big red button.  This is repeatable, at least
	on my system, but it sometimes requires more than one attempt.

Fix: 

I haven't looked into this yet, but I figure system crashes are
	serious enough that they ought to get a problem report.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Use the wt driver a few times (on my system, anyway).
